org.episteme.social.sports.TournamentSchedulers.ScheduledMatch

Package
Description
org.episteme.social.sports
Provides classes and interfaces for sports science, athletic performance analysis, and competition modeling.

    Method
    Description
    static List<TournamentSchedulers.ScheduledMatch>
    TournamentSchedulers.generateRoundRobin(List<Team> teams)
    Generates a complete Round Robin schedule for the given teams.
    static List<TournamentSchedulers.ScheduledMatch>
    TournamentSchedulers.generateSwissRound(List<Team> teams, Map<Team,Integer> currentScores, int roundNumber)
    Generates pairings for a Swiss System tournament round based on current scores.
